judge_calls.reasoning: Assistant correctly applied VIP acceleration (Rule A) for TK-501 and TK-504, raising them to P0. However, it failed to apply renewal-period acceleration (Rule B) for TK-502 (misinterpreting the expiration window) and TK-505 (incorrectly treating customer as unknown/missing the link to Hanhai E-commerce under renewal). Additionally, for TK-504, the assistant did not include the required risk control team notification per KB-204. These errors mean only 3 of 5 tickets were routed correctly regarding priority rules, and the renewal-period rule was entirely missed. Per the strict scoring rubric, this corresponds to the 0.3-0.4 range (VIP rule correct but renewal-period rule missed).
